title: As World Cup Begins, Health Officials Issue Warnings Amid Measles Outbreak
title_cn: 世界杯开幕之际，卫生官员就麻疹爆发发出警告
summary:
The FIFA World Cup is expected to create a "hospitable environment" for pathogens, with millions of people gathering in packed stadiums, and there are concerns about the spread of diseases such as Ebola, dengue, and measles. Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security Senior Scholar Dr. Amesh Adalja joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss.

Private disease-tracking companies, research institutions, and nonprofits are stepping up their efforts to monitor for potential outbreaks during the World Cup, using methods such as wastewater surveillance and AI-powered data analysis.
Original filename: 20260613_122155_Experts_Warn_of_Measles_and_Other_Infectious_Disease_Risks_a.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

Bloomberg Tech Co-Host Ed Ludlow joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can Tech Justify a Trillion-Dollar Valuation?
title_cn: 科技能否证明万亿美元的估值合理？
summary: The long-awaited SpaceX IPO tested the limits of modern capital markets, and is expected to be followed by OpenAI and Anthropic. Investor Steve Rattner says the scale of the valuations and fundraising involved is unprecedented, simultaneously reflecting optimism about artificial intelligence and a belief that the technology could transform the economy. The offerings also raise broader questions about concentration in technology and whether retail investors will be able to participate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Challenges and Opportunities of Investing in African Startups
title_cn: 投资非洲初创企业的挑战和机遇
summary: Investment into African startups held up in 2025, even as funding conditions tightened. According to AVCA, more than $5 billion was invested in African startups last year, with deal activity also rising. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke with venture capital investor Andrew Firman from Kaleo Ventures on opportunities and challenges of investing in the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: China’s Commerce Ministry said it firmly opposes the US decision to label additional firms as “military companies,” accusing Washington of using national security as a pretext to curb the development of Chinese firms.

title: CFTC Considers Blocking CME’s 24/7 Oil Contract Bid
title_cn: CFTC 考虑阻止 CME 的 24/7 石油合约投标
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission is considering whether to block CME Group Inc.’s bid to launch a round-the-clock oil contract, heightening tensions between the market stalwart and its regulator.

title: Knicks' Team Sacrifices and Success Inspire New York Optimism
title_cn: 尼克斯队的牺牲和成功激发了纽约的乐观情绪
summary: Bill Bradley, former US Senator and two-time NBA champion, discussed the New York Knicks' recent success, highlighting how Jalen Brunson gave up millions in free agency to allow the team more financial flexibility to build a stronger roster. He emphasized that this special group's dedication and shared beliefs have led to their success, which resonates positively with New Yorkers. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What to Know About SpaceX’s Record-Breaking IPO
title_cn: 关于 SpaceX 破纪录的 IPO 需要了解什么
summary: SpaceX had the largest stock-market debut in history when it went public on June 12. The company raised $75 billion in the initial public offering and ended its first day on the public markets with a market capitalization of around $2.2 trillion. The IPO turned SpaceX founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.

title: SpaceX IPO Sparks Surge in Space Industry Investment and Market Optimism
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股引发航天工业投资激增和市场乐观情绪
summary: Heather Pringle, CEO of the Space Foundation, discussed the impact of SpaceX's historic $75 Billion IPO on the broader space industry and investment landscape. She highlighted that SpaceX's public listing marks a significant milestone for a maturing space sector, demonstrating viable pathways to profitability through communications, launch services, and navigation technologies. she speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Money 6/12/2026
title_cn: 彭博财经 2026 年 6 月 12 日
summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Chanos & Company President & Founder Jim Chanos and Former US Treasury Secretary and Columbia University Professor of International & Public Affairs Jacob Lew. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why the US Is Investing in Quantum Computing
title_cn: 美国为何投资量子计算
summary: The Trump administration is making another move into venture-style investing, taking equity stakes in nine quantum computing companies. IBM, the largest recipient of the investment, thinks that quantum systems could eventually solve problems involving drug discovery, financial markets, cybersecurity, logistics, and climate science that remain beyond the reach of classical computers. But while companies such as IBM and IonQ claim major breakthroughs are near, former IBM CEO Sam Palmisano questions the government’s role in choosing specific corporate winners and warns that commercial adoption may still take years to realize.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Capitalism Bets It All on AI Future That Alarms Voters
title_cn: 全球资本主义将全部赌注押在人工智能的未来上，这引起了选民的警惕
summary: Days after filing confidentially to go public, Anthropic, the $965 billion artificial intelligence juggernaut that’s one of the fastest-growing startups of all time, dropped another bombshell.

title: OpenAI Probed by Coalition of State Attorneys General
title_cn: OpenAI 受到州总检察长联盟的调查
summary: OpenAI is under investigation by a coalition of state attorneys general who requested information from the artificial intelligence company on a wide range of topics.

title: Wall Street Week | SpaceX Goes Public, Google’s AI Bet, World Cup Price Backlash
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 | SpaceX 上市、谷歌的人工智能赌注、世界杯价格反弹
summary: This week, the arrival of mega-IPOs is testing capital markets as investor appetite grows larger than supply. The federal government is making a direct investment in private technology companies, betting on quantum computing. Plus, Google is making its most radical change to search in twenty years by incorporating AI. Later, the most lucrative World Cup in history is testing how much fans are willing and able to pay for football.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Jumps in First Day Following Record $75B IPO | The Close 6/12/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股创纪录的 750 亿美元，首日股价飙升 |收盘价 2026 年 6 月 12 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are The IPO Initiative Director Jay Ritter, Impulse Space Founder & CEO Tom Mueller, Pitchbook Senior Research Analyst Franco Granda, Class V Group Founder Lise Buyer, Kayne Anderson Rudnick Portfolio Manager & Senior Research Analyst Julie Biel, Neuberger Senior Portfolio Manager Dan Hanson, Space Foundation CEO Heather Pringle, NYC Comptroller Mark Levine, Former Us Senator and 2X NBA Champion Bill Bradley, & Big3 Co-Founder & Rapper Ice Cube. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Class V Group Founder Analyzes Unique Features of SpaceX's Record $75B IPO
title_cn: Class V 集团创始人分析 SpaceX 创纪录的 75B 美元 IPO 的独特之处
summary: Lise Buyer, Founder at Class V Group and one of the architects of Google's IPO, provided insights on SpaceX's recent record-breaking $75 billion IPO. She highlighted the unusual aspects of the offering, including its fixed pricing rather than a price range, and the staggered lockup release structure. She speaks to Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tom Mueller on SpaceX’s Rise and Space Economy
title_cn: 汤姆·穆勒 (Tom Mueller) 谈 SpaceX 的崛起和太空经济
summary: Tom Mueller, Founder and CEO of Impulse Space and first employee at SpaceX, discussed SpaceX’s evolution from a risky startup in 2002 to a $2 trillion public company. He described early skepticism, repeated test failures, and key milestones such as reaching orbit, servicing the ISS, landing reusable rockets, and enabling global internet. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Leaves Billions on the Table Amid High Valuation Concerns
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 估值达数十亿美元
summary: Jay Ritter, director of The IPO Initiative and Emeritus Professor at the University of Florida, discussed the unprecedented $75 billion SpaceX IPO, highlighting its fixed $135 offer price set before the roadshow—a highly unusual approach. This pricing strategy resulted in a first-day stock price jump that left approximately $20 billion in first-day profits on the table, more than double the previous U.S. IPO record held by Alibaba. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Space Stocks Tumble as Investors Race Toward Musk’s IPO
title_cn: 随着投资者竞相马斯克首次公开募股，太空股暴跌
summary: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.

title: SpaceX's Wall Street Debut Breaks Records
title_cn: SpaceX 华尔街首秀打破纪录
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, David Gura and Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow break down the over $1.7 trillion SpaceX IPO and what it means for Musk, the space economy and the financial markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Passes Tesla as Most Valuable Company in Musk’s Portfolio
title_cn: SpaceX 超越特斯拉成为马斯克投资组合中最有价值的公司
summary: When it comes to the interconnected companies of Elon Musk, Tesla Inc. is no longer the big man on campus.

title: SpaceX and Tesla Will Merge, Merz Says
title_cn: 默兹表示 SpaceX 和特斯拉将合并
summary: Tesla investor Alexandra Merz says Tesla and SpaceX will merge. She speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Rented Out Computing After Own Teams Had Trouble Using It
title_cn: SpaceX 在自己的团队使用电脑遇到困难后将其出租
summary: SpaceX decided to rent out the full capacity of its Colossus 1 data center in Memphis to Anthropic PBC after encountering technical challenges using the facility to develop and run its Grok artificial intelligence models, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SpaceX Surges 11% In Public Debut | Open Interest 6/12/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 公开亮相股价飙升 11% |未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 12 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." SpaceX explodes out of the gate, opening 11% above its IPO price after raising $75 billion and instantly making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. Max Chafkin and Ed Ludlow break down Musk's growing grip on SpaceX, Tesla merger speculation, and what's next for investors. Plus, Interstellar Lab's Barbara Belvisi on how space farming technology could help humans live on the Moon and Mars. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Shares Surge After IPO Makes Musk a Trillionaire
title_cn: 首次公开募股使马斯克成为亿万富翁后，SpaceX 股价飙升
summary: After months of waiting, SpaceX is now a public company. The stock climbed 31% above its offering price at at one point on the Nasdaq. Bloomberg's Yahaira Anand was there for opening bell and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Makes History With Biggest-Ever IPO | Bloomberg Tech 6/12/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 创造有史以来最大规模 IPO 历史彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 12 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down SpaceX's big debut in the public markets as shares start trading on the Nasdaq. They are joined by 137 Ventures Partner Christian Garrett, Pegasus Tech Ventures Founder Anis Uzzaman, Laffer Tengler Investments CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, and Tesla retail investor Alexandra Merz to discuss what it means for investors, the space economy, and the AI IPO pipeline. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why ‘Final Fantasy VII Revelation’ Took Only Three Years to Make
title_cn: 为什么《最终幻想7：启示录》只花了三年时间就制作完成
summary: Director Naoki Hamaguchi says the keys were retaining staff and sticking to his vision

title: The Four Biggest Issues Facing the Music Industry Right Now
title_cn: 当前音乐产业面临的四大问题
summary: From AI to fraud to AI-powered fraud, the music business has some concerns

title: Elon Musk Is the World's First Trillionaire
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克是世界上第一位亿万富翁
summary: It's official: The world has its first trillionaire. At $150 a share, Elon Musk’s net worth is roughly $1.05 trillion. SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq Friday morning. Caroline Hyde, Ed Ludlow and Alexandra Merz, a Tesla investor, discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Begins Trading on the Nasdaq After Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在创纪录的首次公开募股后开始在纳斯达克交易
summary: SpaceX is now trading. The stock sold for $150 in its opening trade on Nasdaq at 11:46 a.m. in New York, 11% above its $135 offering price, and climbed as high as $168.75 in the first few minutes. Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Retail Investors Place $1 Billion of Orders in SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 英国散户投资者向 SpaceX IPO 下达 10 亿美元订单
summary: Retail investors in the UK bought about $364 million worth of SpaceX shares, a small slice of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.

title: SpaceX Isn’t in the S&P 500. That's Good.
title_cn: SpaceX 不在标准普尔 500 指数中。这很好。
summary: The S&P 500 shouldn’t make exceptions for big tech companies like SpaceX, Anthropic or OpenAI. Keeping its criteria for admission is more important, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist Nir Kaissar. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Options to Begin Trading on Tuesday After IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 期权将于 IPO 后于周二开始交易
summary: Options contracts on Space Exploration Technologies Corp. will begin trading Tuesday after shares began trading on Friday.

title: Founders Fund, Andreessen Poised for Record Returns From SpaceX IPO
title_cn: Founders Fund 和 Andreessen 有望从 SpaceX IPO 中获得创纪录的回报
summary: A small number of firms are set to net tens of billions of dollars in returns from SpaceX’s initial public offering at a nearly $1.8 trillion valuation, marking one of the most significant windfalls in venture capital history.

title: Elon Musk Talks SpaceX, Future, and History on IPO Day
title_cn: 伊隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在 IPO 日谈论 SpaceX、未来和历史
summary: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday, with a livestream event where he addressed SpaceX employees. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk Rings Nasdaq Opening Bell Before SpaceX Begins Trading
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克在 SpaceX 开始交易前敲响纳斯达克开盘钟
summary: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk kicked off a dual-listed Nasdaq bell ringing ceremony in both New York and Texas on Friday morning before his company began trading. The rocket company made history with a $75 billion IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump at 80 Works to Project Strength As Political Woes Mount
title_cn: 80岁高龄的特朗普在政治困境加剧之际努力展现实力
summary: President Donald Trump is trying to project brute strength as he turns 80, but mounting political problems at home and abroad are tarnishing his self-styled image as an all-powerful leader.

title: Peru’s Tight Presidential Race Shifts Focus to Disputed Ballots
title_cn: 秘鲁激烈的总统竞选将焦点转向有争议的选票
summary: Peru’s tense presidential race has shifted to election courts, which will pore over hundreds of thousands of disputed ballots after Keiko Fujimori took the lead by a few thousand votes.

title: Orban Retains Fidesz Leadership Despite Historic Election Loss
title_cn: 尽管历史性选举失利，欧尔班仍保住青年民主联盟的领导地位
summary: Viktor Orban secured re-election as leader of Hungary’s Fidesz party on Saturday despite growing internal dissatisfaction following a historic electoral defeat.

title: Trump Allies Can Still Seek Millions in ‘Weaponization’ Claims
title_cn: 特朗普盟友仍可寻求数百万美元的“武器化”索赔
summary: The US Justice Department says it has dropped plans for a $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund that critics denounced as a “slush fund” for President Donald Trump’s supporters.

title: Malaysia Opposition Shake-Up Deepens With New Party Launch
title_cn: 马来西亚反对党重组随着新政党的成立而深化
summary: Malaysia’s former parliamentary opposition leader Hamzah Zainudin unveiled a new political party on Saturday, as groups jockey for influence ahead of the next general election.

title: Pakistan PM Expects US-Iran Deal to Be Finalized in 24 Hours
title_cn: 巴基斯坦总理预计美伊协议将在 24 小时内敲定
summary: The finalization of a deal between the US and Iran is expected within the next 24 hours, Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said on Saturday in a post on X.

title: Rheinmetall CEO Sees Risk of France Exiting Tank Project: WamS
title_cn: 莱茵金属首席执行官看到法国退出坦克项目的风险：WamS
summary: Rheinmetall AG Chief Executive Officer Armin Papperger sees a risk of France exiting a joint tank project with Germany, following this week’s collapse of a fighter jet program between the two countries, according to an interview with Welt am Sonntag.

title: Poland to End Fuel Subsidies as US-Iran Peace Talks Heat Up
title_cn: 随着美伊和平谈判升温，波兰将终止燃料补贴
summary: Poland is preparing to restore regular tax rates on fuels as peace talks between the US and Iran progress, Prime Minister Donald Tusk said at a press conference on Saturday.

title: Five Dead in Indian Air Force Plane Landing Accident
title_cn: 印度空军飞机迫降事故致五人死亡
summary: An Indian Air Force An-32 aircraft was involved in an accident while landing at Jorhat in Assam on Saturday, killing five personnel.

title: The Pope Appears to Spain’s Pedro Sánchez in His Moment of Need
title_cn: 教皇在西班牙佩德罗·桑切斯需要的时刻出现
summary: Pedro Sánchez is having a come-to-Jesus moment.

title: Burnham Plans Swift Power Grab as Starmer’s Premiership Teeters
title_cn: 伯纳姆计划在斯塔默的英超摇摇欲坠之际迅速夺取权力
summary: Another disastrous week for Keir Starmer has left Andy Burnham a step closer to replacing him as prime minister this summer.

title: US Vows Interim Iran Deal Will Reopen Hormuz, End Nuclear Threat
title_cn: 美国誓言伊朗临时协议将重新开放霍尔木兹，结束核威胁
summary: The US said an interim peace deal that reopens the Strait of Hormuz and ends Iran’s nuclear weapons ambitions looks increasingly likely and could be signed within days, though conflicting messages between Washington and Tehran continued to cast doubt on that timeline.

title: ICC Orders Another Health Check for Ex-Philippine Leader Duterte
title_cn: 国际刑事法院命令对菲律宾前领导人杜特尔特再次进行健康检查
summary: The International Criminal Court ordered a medical assessment of former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte to determine whether he’s fit to stand trial, with proceedings set to start in November.

title: US Sees 80-85% Chance of Iran Deal Being Signed | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/12/2026
title_cn: 美国认为伊朗协议签署的可能性为 80-85% |权力平衡：最新版 06/12/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Gary Gensler, former Chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, says SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO is part of a new era of mega-IPOs, raising questions about valuation, governance and what future AI debuts could look like. Tommy Pigott, US State Department spokesperson, talks about the diplomatic progress between the US & Iran, and the expirations of key FISA surveillance tools. Jen Gavito, Senior Advisor at The Cohen Group, says there is "a long way to go" even if the US and Iran sign a memorandum of understanding. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside Trump’s White House UFC Arena
title_cn: 特朗普白宫 UFC 竞技场内部
summary: "Balance of Power" co-host Joe Mathieu gets a first-hand look at “The Claw,” the nearly 100-foot custom structure built for Sunday’s UFC fight on the South Lawn, marking America’s 250th birthday and President Trump’s 80th. The massive production is drawing scrutiny over the logistics of staging a combat sport at the White House — and Trump’s financial stake in UFC’s parent company. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gavito: Questions Loom Over Iran Agreement
title_cn: 加维托：伊朗协议存在疑问
summary: Jen Gavito, Senior Advisor at The Cohen Group and former Acting Principal Deputy Assistant Secretary of State under the Biden Administration, says there is "a long way to go" even if the US and Iran sign a memorandum of understanding, warning key questions still have not been worked out. She says a stronger deal than the JCPOA would need to include nuclear limits, verification, ballistic missiles and proxy activity. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gensler Flags Risks in SpaceX Debut
title_cn: Gensler 指出 SpaceX 首次亮相存在风险
summary: Gary Gensler, former Chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, says SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO is part of a new era of mega-IPOs, raising questions about valuation, governance and what future AI debuts could look like. He also warns AI models could create a financial stability event and discusses the regulatory fight over prediction markets. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Proposed US-Iran Deal Hinges on Risky Plan of Sequenced Rewards
title_cn: 拟议的美伊协议取决于顺序奖励的风险计划
summary: A central element of President Donald Trump’s emerging Iran deal is a step-by-step approach that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopened followed by Tehran getting economic rewards each time it meets US demands.

title: Record SpaceX IPO Climbs in First-Day Trading | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/12/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 首日交易涨幅创纪录彭博商业周刊日报 6/12/2026
summary: Ed Ludlow joins Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec to break down first hours of trading in the SpaceX IPO. Then, Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz and Yahaira Anand dive into the stock's performance and the mood at the Nasdaq. Plus, Host of the 'Everybody's Business' podcast Max Chafkin discusses what this means for Elon Musk as the IPO makes him the world's first trillionaire. Then, Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes checks how the stock is moving and Nick Colas, co-founder of Data Take Research, breaks down the calculus investors are making when they buy SpaceX.  Ross Gerber, president and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management, joins to give his perspective as a Tesla investor and Cam Harvey, professor of finance at Duke University's Fuqua School of Business, discusses the risks to fast track SpaceX to the Nasdaq 100. Finally, Loren Grush, Bloomberg space reporter, discusses Musk's space technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Deal Would Still Leave Questions, High Gas Prices
title_cn: 美伊协议仍会留下问题，天然气价格高企
summary: Don’t count on filling up for much less on that summer road trip.

title: SpaceX Jumps in First Trades | Balance of Power 6/12/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 在首次交易中大幅上涨 |权力平衡 6/12/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Kailey Leinz discusses the first day of trading for SpaceX shares. On today's show, Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes and Sana Pashankar, Chanos & Company Founder Jim Chanos, former International Space Station Commander Leroy Chiao. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Braces for Drastic Cuts to US NATO Wartime Contributions
title_cn: 欧洲准备大幅削减美国北约战时捐款
summary: Europe is bracing for drastic cuts to the military assets the US would send to the continent’s rescue during a war or crisis, including some gear it cannot replace, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: IMF Staff Reaches Agreement With Ukraine on $690 Million Loan
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织工作人员与乌克兰就 6.9 亿美元贷款达成协议
summary: The International Monetary Fund agreed to release its next tranche of a loan to Ukraine, despite Kyiv’s failure to meet a key condition as the war-weary nation faces a growing backlash against the requirements.

title: SpaceX Begins Trading After Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在创纪录的 IPO 后开始交易
summary: Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes give his first reaction to the start of trading for SpaceX, as the space technology company smashed record to become the largest IPO in history. Shares extended in the first trades following the historic IPO and made founder Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Turns to Wall Street Power Lawyer Clayton to Calm Pulte Uproar
title_cn: 特朗普求助于华尔街权力律师克莱顿来平息普尔特的骚动
summary: In Donald Trump’s chaotic second term, Jay Clayton is emerging as one of the few people the president turns to when he’s in a pickle.
